title: Buying Cold Medicine
scene: 你在药店买非处方感冒药。

turns.cn: 你好，我感冒流鼻涕，有什么推荐？
turns.en: Hi, I have a cold and a runny nose. What do you recommend?
Try DayQuil for daytime. It won't make you drowsy.
What about at night?
NyQuil helps you sleep. Don't drive after taking it.
How many times a day?

turns.cn: 每四到六小时一次，不要超过四剂。
turns.en: Every four to six hours, no more than four doses.
I'll take both. Thank you.

title: Allergy Medicine
scene: 春天花粉过敏，你去药店咨询。

turns.cn: 我花粉过敏，眼睛痒打喷嚏。
turns.en: I have pollen allergies. My eyes itch and I keep sneezing.

turns.cn: 氯雷他定每天一片，副作用小。
turns.en: Loratadine, one tablet daily. Fewer side effects.
Do I need a prescription?
No, it's over the counter.
Do you have eye drops too?
Yes, they're in aisle three.
Thanks for the advice!

title: First Aid Supplies
scene: 你准备在家放一个急救箱。

turns.en: Can I help you find something?

turns.cn: 我想买一个家用急救包。
turns.en: I'm looking for a home first-aid kit.

turns.cn: 这款含绷带、消毒液和创可贴。
turns.en: This one has bandages, antiseptic, and band-aids.
Do you carry thermometers?
Yes, digital ones are behind the counter.
I'll take both. Can I pay by card?
Sure. Checkout is right here.

title: Vaccination
scene: 你在药店预约流感疫苗。

turns.en: Hi, I'd like to get a flu shot.

turns.cn: 有预约吗？需要填一份同意书。
turns.en: Do you have an appointment? You'll need to fill out a consent form.
No appointment. Is walk-in available now?
Yes. Please wait about five minutes.
Any precautions after the shot?

turns.cn: 注射处可能酸痛，多喝水。
turns.en: Your arm may be sore. Drink plenty of water.
Okay. Thank you.

title: Children's Medicine
scene: 孩子发烧，你到药店买儿童退烧药并咨询剂量。

turns.cn: 孩子五岁，发烧三十八点五度，买什么？
turns.en: My child is five and has a fever of 38.5°C. What should I get?

turns.cn: 儿童布洛芬悬液，按体重给药。
turns.en: Children's ibuprofen suspension. Dose it by weight.
He weighs eighteen kilograms. How much per dose?

turns.cn: 五毫升，每六到八小时一次。
turns.en: Five milliliters every six to eight hours.
Can he take it with food?

turns.cn: 可以，饭后更不容易胃不舒服。
turns.en: Yes. After meals is easier on the stomach.

turns.cn: 烧不退什么时候该看医生？
turns.en: When should we see a doctor if the fever doesn't go down?

title: OTC Cold Medicine
scene: 你感冒到药店，药剂师推荐非处方药。

turns.cn: 鼻塞咳嗽，不想嗜睡，买什么？
turns.en: Stuffy nose and cough. I don't want drowsiness. What should I get?

turns.cn: 白天用这款，晚上用含抗组胺的。
turns.en: This one for daytime. Night version has antihistamine.
Can I take it with Tylenol?

turns.cn: 看成分，别重复对乙酰氨基酚。
turns.en: Check ingredients. Don't double up acetaminophen.
How many times a day?

turns.cn: 每四小时，不超过标签量。
turns.en: Every four hours. Don't exceed the label.
Thank you.

title: Drive-Through Pharmacy
scene: 你在药店得来速窗口取处方药，喇叭听不清。

turns.en: Zhang? Last four eight eight two three?
Yes. Could you repeat how to take it?
One tablet morning and night with food.
Ten-dollar copay. Here's my card.
Bag's coming out the window.
Got it. Thanks.

title: Side Effects Question
scene: 新药吃了胃不舒服，你回药店咨询。

turns.en: This medicine makes me nauseous. Is that normal?
Common early on. Take it with meals.
If it lasts days, should I stop?
Call your prescriber first.
Can I switch brands?
Usually yes if the ingredient is the same.
Thanks for the advice.

title: Walk-In Flu Shot
scene: 你直接走进药店打流感疫苗。

turns.cn: 需要预约吗？打流感疫苗。
turns.en: Do I need an appointment for a flu shot?

turns.cn: 不用，填表，大多数保险免费。
turns.en: Walk-in's fine. Form here. Usually free with insurance.
I have an egg allergy. Is it safe?

turns.cn: 轻微一般可以，严重要问医生。
turns.en: Mild usually okay. Ask your doctor if it's severe.
Left arm okay?
Sure. Roll up your sleeve.
Thank you.

title: Generic vs Brand
scene: 药剂师问你要品牌药还是仿制药。

turns.en: Generic available. Twelve dollars cheaper.
Same effect?
Same active ingredient. FDA approved.
Generic, please.
Sure. Five minutes.
Thanks.
